selectedTaskBefore.title: Prove the packaging path and document the manual `.vsix` install workflow
selectedTaskBefore.notes: The repo already includes packaging scripts and a packaged artifact, but the operator-facing release/install path is not yet part of the durable backlog.

selectedTaskAfter.title: Prove the packaging path and document the manual `.vsix` install workflow
selectedTaskAfter.notes: Documented the operator-facing `npm run package` plus manual `.vsix` install workflow, hardened the package script for this repo by using `vsce package --no-dependencies`, added repository metadata plus README links that `vsce` can rewrite, and validated a fresh `ralph-codex-workbench-0.1.0.vsix` build. Packaging still warns about a missing LICENSE file and the lack of `.vscodeignore` or a `files` allowlist.
